title: Vivi’s Identity Echoes Forward
description: On pages 6–8, vivi’s identity echoes forward as the Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent.
scene: Vivi’s Identity Echoes Forward. The Straw Hats escape Little Garden with help from Dorry and Brogy, but Nami’s worsening illness makes the next destination urgent. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: "Princess Vivi."

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: If I recall correctly, that's the name of the alabastan Princess who's currently missing.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Speaking of Alabama, I hear that kingdom is in the midst of a coup diet.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...you don't think the straw-hat pirates and this mysterious criminal organization has something to do with all that, do you...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I don't know, but this is the only lead that we've got on the straw-hat pirates right now.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So then...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Request HQ for an eternal pose.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yessir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why don't we go see,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Exactly what the desert kingdom of Alabasta has in store for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Island of Giants, "Little Garden"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gababa Baba!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You little ones really helped us out back there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If there's anything we can do to thank you...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Gegyagra Gyagya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I had completely forgotten about the Bounties placed on our heads!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But even so...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's originally my fault,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that those agents came to this island...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oww!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't say that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why the Long Face, VIVI?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wanna eat some Senbei?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where the heck did you get those from?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: See, nobody here blames you for anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Alright! Time for a Senbei Party!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah, let's get this party started! Take it all off, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wipe Wipe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! Your eyeballs are on fire, USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: idiots...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're in serious trouble if we have to wait a full year for the log to record.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Exactly! This is no laughing matter.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Can't you misters do something about that?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Don't speak nonsense. Even we can't do a thing about the logs.

summary: This part centers on vivi’s identity echoes forward, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
